backend/main.mo: Motoko backend defining user profiles, strategies, licenses, trades, and access-controlled APIs for retrieving and updating user profile data with supporting maps and types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a required frontend change replacing Web Crypto Ed25519 with @noble/ed25519 in ConnectBotWizardModal.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of various frontend components, hooks, utilities, styles, and documentation files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based theme definitions with OKLCH tokens and dark mode variables for the app’s design system.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point with root div and module script loading the React app.
frontend/index.ts: Type definitions for the SignalFetchResult union used to represent HTTP outcall responses.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed checklist outlining step-by-step backend implementation tasks for Phase 1 including types, APIs, and backward compatibility.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Roadmap document describing phased frontend and backend tasks across phases 3–8 with strict constraints on file modifications.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling authentication, profile loading, landing screen, and rendering the app shell with profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity, handling authentication state and errors.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Displays a modal for users to enter and submit their profile information.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Renders an access denied alert for users lacking required permissions.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Implements a toast notification system with context, rendering dismissible toasts.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries in a scrollable table with loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Shows the main navigation header with screen switching and admin-specific options.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Displays an equity curve chart using fetched data, with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Shows a live terminal-like log feed and provides a connectivity test button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: A terminal-like panel that logs bot uplink pings and runs a connectivity test via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve chart with loading and error states using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat data including status, license, cycles, and warnings with loading/error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Provides a visual uplink status indicator and toggle to enable or disable the bot’s uplink.
Main application shell handling hash/path routing, screen rendering, and header/footer layout.
frontend/src/components/settings/AdminTi: Admin panel listing subscription tiers with status, pricing, limits, and features.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: UI panel showing bot connection status and a button to open a configuration wizard.
Multi-step modal for generating an Ed25519 keypair, linking the bot’s public key, and setting the bot URL.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Form for viewing and updating user profile fields including display name, account ID, timezone, and notification settings.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal allowing admins to set Stripe secret keys and allowed country codes for payments.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tiers, handles Stripe checkout flow, and shows admin-only Stripe configuration options.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Hooks for checking admin status and managing license records via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Hook to fetch and periodically refresh the audit log from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Hooks to fetch and save the authenticated user's profile via React Query and actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Computes an equity curve from paginated trades using the user's account ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a connectivity test by calling fetchSignals and shows toast success/error messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches periodic heartbeat data for a given account with auto‑refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity context, login handling, and stored identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Fetches the current user's license status from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Registers a bot public key and invalidates related queries with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches live trades/logs for the user's account with frequent polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Validates and saves a bot URL, handling backend errors and updating cached bot profile data.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Stripe config hooks for checking setup, updating config, creating checkout sessions, and querying session status.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Retrieves subscription tiers or a single tier via actor queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trades for an account with optional time filters.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Fetches bot profile data and toggles uplink state with toast feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom theme variables for dark terminal‑style UI.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for className merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entrypoint setting up React Query and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin UI for managing user licenses with create, update, and revoke actions.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Renders the main dashboard layout using a bento-style grid with controller, terminal, telemetry, and audit panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays user license and account status with conditional states based on profile and license data.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Shows a payment failure message with actions to retry or return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Shows a payment success confirmation and a button to return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Provides a tabbed settings interface for profile, bot connection, subscription, and admin tiers.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Displays paginated trade history with filters for account ID and date range.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes various backend error messages into user-friendly text.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-to-bytes and bytes-to-hex conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes trade PnL values.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind config defining dark mode, content paths, extended theme settings, custom colors, fonts, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: JSON metadata describing project state, Stripe integration notes, architectural constraints, and known issues for the Smart Money Vault project.
